description: You are a county court administrator assigned to design a municipal small-claims courtroom using the provided building shell in Sweet Home 3D. Lay out the courtroom with strict functional zoning by constructing at least 3 interior partition walls and placing at least 3 doors for separate circulation paths. Furnish the courtroom with at least 35 items from the catalog, including a judge's bench area (minimum 1 desk, 1 executive chair, and 2 shelves/cabinets), a jury box and public gallery (minimum 22 chairs total), and areas for counsel, witness, and clerk (minimum 3 tables/desks and 7 chairs total). Identify at least 4 zones, such as 'Judge', 'Jury', 'Gallery', and 'Counsel', using text labels on the floor plan. Save the completed design to /home/ga/Documents/courtroom.sh3d.
